div.div:
Figure 4. From reusable state to a possible state-artifact economy
What could become portable is not an arbitrary prompt, but a compatibility-checked state object with provenance and policy metadata

div.div: The artifact metaphor becomes plausible only if memory is explicit, versioned, and cheap to reload relative to re-creating full context.
